_instructions: Paste this entire JSON into Nano Banana 2. No reference images needed. Generate 3-4 variations and pick the best

subject.demographics: American woman, 33, fair skin with warm undertones, Eastern European-American heritage. Born and raised in the US — think New York or Chicago suburbs

signature_details.primary: Deep-set under-eye hollows with visible purple-blue veins beneath thin under-eye skin. NOT just dark circles — the actual veins are visible through translucent fair skin under the eyes. Genetic + sleep deprivation combo. This is her defining feature, visible from any distance
signature_details.secondary: Small cluster of 4 tiny raised moles along right jawline near ear, descending like a trail. Each mole is 1-2mm, slightly darker than skin, spaced about 5mm apart in a diagonal line from earlobe toward jaw corner
signature_details.tertiary: Slightly crooked front bottom teeth — one overlaps the other by 2mm. Only visible when mouth opens slightly or when she speaks

subject.hair: Sandy brown, fine texture, shoulder-length. Day-three flat roots, greasy at the crown, dry splitting ends. Pushed behind both ears, no clip, no style. The hair of someone who stopped caring about it 2 days ago. Natural color, no highlights, no dye — just mousey sandy brown
subject.skin_details: Fair with warm undertones but currently looking dull and sallow. The under-eye hollows are the dominant feature — purple-blue veins visible through thin translucent skin. Visible pores on nose and inner cheeks. Redness around nostrils and chin (mild irritation/sensitivity — the kind from constantly blowing nose or rubbing face). Dry flaky patches on cheekbones. One active small red blemish on left temple. Lips are pale pink, lower lip slightly chapped with one small crack
subject.apparel: Oversized heather grey crewneck sweatshirt, well-worn — pilling at cuffs, faded from 100+ washes, stretched neckline showing collarbone. No bra strap visible. The sweatshirt is too big (probably partner's or bought oversized)
accessories: Thin silver chain necklace with tiny disc pendant (6mm diameter, plain, no engraving) sitting in collarbone hollow
Small silver stud earrings in first holes, second piercing holes empty (grew closed)
Stretched-out burgundy velvet scrunchie on left wrist — been there for days

expression.type: NEUTRAL for avatar lock. Natural resting face. Not reacting, not posing, not smiling. The face of someone running on 5 hours of fragmented sleep — just existing
expression.micro_expression: The deep-set under-eye hollows give a permanent exhausted quality even when expression is neutral. Mouth corners naturally neutral-to-slightly-down. Eyes slightly narrowed — not squinting, just tired. Overall impression: 'I need coffee but even coffee isn't fixing this anymore'
expression.gaze: Looking 2-3 degrees right of lens. Slightly unfocused, tired gaze. The 'staring at nothing' look

camera.DOF: DEEP. Everything in sharp focus. NO blur. NO portrait mode
camera.framing: Head and shoulders ONLY. Centered. Clean and simple. NO hands in frame. NO phone visible. NO props. Just face, neck, and upper shoulders against a simple background

lighting.source: Soft natural window light from the left. Cool morning light (not warm/golden — she looks washed out). Subtle shadow on right side of face
lighting.note: The lighting should make the under-eye veins and hollows MORE visible, not less. No flattering warm light that hides her tiredness

environment.setting: Simple neutral background. Plain light-colored wall. THIS IS AN AVATAR REFERENCE — no elaborate scene. All attention on her face
environment.note: AVATAR LOCK IMAGE. No context. No story. Just the person
